description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image and the docker:dind service, with the DOCKER_DRIVER variable set to overlay2 and jobs marked interruptible. Define a single job named publish:docker that runs in the default stage and is limited to the master branch. In this job, first execute docker login -u "${CI_REGISTRY_USER}" -p "${CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD}" "${CI_REGISTRY}", then change into the app directory and run docker build . -t ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:latest. The job should run on runners tagged docker.
